description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps 📱!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
New in v6.4.1:
- welcome your contacts: set profile bio and welcome message.
- enable disappearing messages by default for new contacts.
- short SimpleX addresses and group links now include profile images and welcome messages.
The GitHub release build is independently reproduced by:
─────────────────┬─────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────
Verifier         │Signature                │PGP key to verify
─────────────────┼─────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────
SimpleX Chat team│_sha256sums.asc          │FB44AF81A45BDE327319797C85107E357D4A17FC
─────────────────┼─────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────
Flux team        │_sha256sums_flux.asc     │F3244FFC7207DB2CAA355DF506139DA3A0B13EC1
─────────────────┴─────────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────
Huge thanks to Flux for providing their servers via the app!
Read more: https://simplex.chat/blog/20250729-simplex-chat-v6-4-1-welcome-contacts-protect-groups-app-security.html
Commits:
- flatpak: update metainfo (#6085)
- github/workflows: fix reproduce schedule (#6075)
- docs: code of conduct (#6084)
- android: do not show message bubble tails on Android 8 (#6087)
- core: update simplexmq (faster creation of notification credentials)
- ui: allow to add/edit profile short description, length limit; allow to set welcome message for address without auto-accept (#6086)
- core, ui: chat banner (#6089)
- core: enable operator flux by default (#6096)
- docs: bots API (#6091)
- core, ui: allow to choose disappearing messages ttl in user profile (#6097)
- core: improve indexes (#6095)
- typescript README: fix typo (#6100)
- Merge branch 'stable'
- core: 6.4.1.0 (simplexmq 6.4.1.0)
- core: fix queries so they work for postgres (#6103)
- core: fix retrying connection via contact card (preset contacts) (#6104)
- core: backward compatible JSON parser for remote controller/host (#6105)
- Merge branch 'stable'
- core: 6.4.1.1
- ios: update core library
- 6.4.1-beta.0: ios 291, android 305, desktop 113
- website: translations (#6110)
- android, desktop: add Indonesian, Romanian and Vietnamese UI languages
- ui: translations (#6109)
- ui: v6.4.1 whats new, blog placeholder (WIP) (#6108)
- Translated using Weblate (Hungarian) (#6111)
- doc(bots): add bridge bot (#6106)
- ui: offer to upgrade address and group link when sharing it (#6114)
- ui: translations (#6116)
- Translated using Weblate (Bulgarian) (#6117)
- ui: remove duplicate translation string
- core: fix duplicate banner when connecting to member contact (#6118)
- core: store/get whether short link has large data set (#6120)
- ui: fix possible suspect for race condition on accept contact (#6121)
- ui: what's new address interactions (#6119)
- core: 6.4.1.2
- ui: translations (#6122)
- ci: upgrade cabal (#6123)
- 6.4.1: ios 292, android 307, desktop 114
